---
title: FrameLab
date: '2025-01-10'
description: A Tool for Browser Framing
categories:
- Social Media
- Data Science
image: featured.webp
image-alt: FrameLab tool for capturing website previews in desktop browser windows
featured: true
---

[Launch Tool](https://noahweidig.com/framelab){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A creative tool for capturing website screenshots framed in a desktop browser window. Perfect for creating polished previews for social media, portfolios, or presentations.
